hooks.command: for d in .claude/worktrees/agent-*/; do [ -d "$d" ] && [ ! -e "${d}target" ] && id=$(basename "$d") && mkdir -p /media/games/workspacemsg-worktree-targets/"$id" && ln -s /media/games/workspacemsg-worktree-targets/"$id" "${d}target"; done 2>/dev/null; exit 0

find .claude/worktrees -maxdepth 1 -name 'agent-*' -mtime +1 2>/dev/null | while read wt; do id=$(basename "$wt"); branch="worktree-${id}"; ahead=$(jj log -r "${branch} ~ ::main" --no-graph -T 'commit_id' 2>/dev/null | head -c1); if [ -n "$ahead" ]; then echo "SKIP ${id} — branch ${branch} has unmerged commits (run \"jj rebase -s ${branch} -d main\" to integrate, then re-run cleanup)" >&2; continue; fi; rm -rf "$wt" "/media/games/workspacemsg-worktree-targets/$id"; done; git worktree prune 2>/dev/null; exit 0
